description: Push Dagster run lifecycle events (success + failure) as OTLP/HTTP log records to any OTel-compatible backend (Splunk via Splunk OTC, Datadog OTel ingest, Honeycomb, Sumo, Grafana Loki via OTC).

otlp_endpoint_env_var.label: OTLP Endpoint Env Var
otlp_endpoint_env_var.description: Env var with OTLP/HTTP endpoint base URL. /v1/logs is appended.

otlp_headers_env_var.label: OTLP Headers Env Var
otlp_headers_env_var.description: Env var with comma-separated headers (OTel convention).

monitor_jobs.label: Monitor Jobs
monitor_jobs.description: Only emit for these Dagster job names. None = all.
